title: Scrollable Tooltips
description: Adds the ability to scroll through tooltips that are larger than the screen
body:
# Scrollable Tooltips
A clientsided minecraft mod allowing long item tooltips to be scrolled through

### Example:
![alttext](https://github.com/ADON15c/Scrollable-Tooltips/blob/83d786d1467860195296883950c0b5fe256738a0/ReadmeAssets/ScrollableTooltipsDemo.png?raw=true)
